rag_rules: Place AGREE assumptions and guarantees in component type scopes when referring to component ports
Use annex agree {** ... **}; blocks for all AGREE contract content
generic_rules: Align helper declaration types with actual expression types in AGREE
Omit unsafe Boolean range comparisons unless port is explicitly AGREE bool
Use valid AGREE scalar types: int, real, bool for declarations
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in annex agree {** ... **}; blocks
Component type scopes are preferred for assumptions and guarantees involving ports
anti_patterns: Do not reference subcomponent ports in component type contracts without valid variables
Do not use invalid scalar type names like 'integer' or 'boolean' in AGREE declarations
